headline: Anthropic Standardizes Claude Code Extensions
lede: This central repository establishes the structural blueprint for Claude Code extensions. By enforcing standardized metadata and plugin protocols, it allows developers to modularly scale agentic workflows.

headline: CodeGraph Maps Repository Logic for Faster Retrieval
lede: CodeGraph replaces high-latency grep searches with a persistent, SQLite-backed index of symbol relationships. The system synchronizes via native file-watchers to maintain a fluid, low-overhead stream of architectural data for AI agents.

headline: RuView Tracks Human Presence Using WiFi Signals
lede: This prototype explores the physics of radio wave disturbances to detect vital signs and movement without cameras. It is a raw, iterative proof-of-concept that turns inexpensive ESP32 hardware into a sophisticated spatial intelligence sensor.

headline: Master AI Engineering Through First-Principles Construction
lede: Forget surface-level API calls; this curriculum maps the path from linear algebra to autonomous agent deployment. Each lesson acts as a graph-paper guide for building core AI components from the ground up.

headline: Chrome DevTools MCP Bridges Browser and Agent
lede: Give your AI agent a visual interface into the web with this direct bridge to browser internals. It transforms opaque runtime errors into actionable data, allowing for precise, automated front-end debugging.

headline: Extend .NET Agents with Specialized Skill Plugins
lede: Operating quietly in the background of your .NET projects, these plugins provide the domain-specific logic necessary for autonomous debugging and scaffolding. This framework ensures your agents navigate runtime environments with precision after hours.

headline: Understand-Anything Visualizes Complex Codebase Topographies
lede: By transforming monolithic codebases into interactive knowledge graphs, this tool rapidly reduces the cognitive load of onboarding. It provides an immediate, high-level map of architectural dependencies and business logic.

headline: Odoo Consolidates Business Workflows into Modular Apps
lede: Odoo provides a reliable, scalable foundation for managing enterprise resources within a single open-source ecosystem. Its modular architecture allows organizations to deploy only the services required for modern, operational efficiency.

headline: CFnew Streamlines Cloudflare Worker Management
lede: This utility brings rugged control to your Cloudflare proxy services through an intuitive, persistent interface. It automates complex routing and IP optimization, leaving the manual shell scripting behind.

headline: The Book of Secret Knowledge Archives Essential Dev Resources
lede: A scholarly compilation of technical wisdom, this repository organizes the fragmented landscape of CLI tools, networking utilities, and security practices. It serves as an essential reference for engineers who prefer curated facts over chaotic searches.
